codeReview.summary: The theme toggle implementation is correct and follows the frontend-worker skill pattern exactly. All feature requirements are met: theme toggle icon in header, cycling through light/dark/system, persistence in localStorage key 'acs2906_theme', and application to entire app. Settings nav item was removed as expected.

sharedStateObservations.observation: No convention gaps found. The worker followed the exact pattern from the frontend-worker skill for adding theme toggle.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: The implementation matches the skill's example code: same localStorage key ('acs2906_theme'), same cycling logic (light→dark→system→light), same classList manipulation approach.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker followed the frontend-worker skill procedure exactly. No deviations from the documented pattern.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Code matches skill example: useState initialization reading from localStorage, cycleTheme function with correct transition logic, useEffect applying document.documentElement.classList, system preference listener.

sharedStateObservations.observation: No new services or commands were used that aren't documented in services.yaml. Worker used npm run build and npm run lint, both documented.

sharedStateObservations.observation: No knowledge gaps found. The worker used the documented skill pattern without needing to discover any additional information.

summary: Review passed. The theme toggle feature is correctly implemented with all expected behaviors: Sun/Moon icon toggle visible in header, cycling through light→dark→system modes, persisting to localStorage with key 'acs2906_theme', applying to entire app via document.documentElement.classList, listening for system theme changes, and also added to mobile sidebar. Settings nav item was removed. No blocking issues found. Worker followed documented skill procedure exactly.
